name: Yixin (Fiona) Zhao

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.title: InMenu
projects.description: Full-stack Flutter app tackling language barriers for non-English-speaking restaurant diners. Cache-first architecture with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini-powered menu translation supporting English, Spanish, and Chinese. Built on Supabase with PostgreSQL, Edge Functions, and Docker.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Production-ready full-stack portfolio with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Features an OpenAI API-powered chat assistant, interactive Three.js 3D hero scene, and Framer Motion scroll-driven animations. FastAPI backend. Built with Cursor and MCPs.

projects.title: SafeLINC
projects.description: HIPAA-compliant suicide prevention mobile app developed at UCF STIR Lab. Frontend lead on Android using React Native and Expo, with AWS AppSync (GraphQL) for real-time data sync and AWS Cognito for secure authentication.

projects.title: BeReal (iOS Clone)
projects.description: iOS application replicating BeReal's core dual-camera capture and social feed. Built natively in Swift with UIKit, custom Camera API integration, and RESTful networking.

projects.title: Price Prediction Model
projects.description: ML regression model for price prediction using Python, Pandas, and Scikit-learn with feature engineering, model evaluation, and hyperparameter tuning.

workExperience.role: Ground Experience Representative / Ground Security Coordinator
responsibilities: Lead daily screening operations for charter flights, coordinating team members to maintain regulatory compliance, safety, and efficient passenger flow.
Serve as key communication link between ground crew, flight crew, and leadership to maintain alignment and operational clarity.
Lead by example in high-pressure situations, making timely decisions that protect safety and deliver excellent customer service.
Designed and delivered structured, engaging lesson plans making complex robotics and programming topics accessible and practical.
Managed classroom activities while maintaining a positive, collaborative learning environment.
Provided individualized support to ensure each student understood core concepts and problem-solving strategies.

relocation: Open to relocation for job opportunities.
availability: Currently employed at Tri-State Jet Charter; open to full-time software engineering roles.
careerGoals: Grow as a full-stack and mobile engineer building reliable, user-focused products—especially where AI, cloud, and polished UX meet.
